class.name: PlayFabUser
class.brief_description: Cached PlayFab session wrapper for a local Xbox user.
class.description: Represents a signed-in PlayFab session associated with one local Xbox user. The public surface intentionally exposes only the local user id and the PlayFab entity key needed by higher-level services such as leaderboards.

method.name: get_local_id
method.description: Returns the local Xbox user id associated with this PlayFab session.

method.name: get_entity_key
method.description: Returns the PlayFab entity key as a [Dictionary] with [code]id[/code] and [code]type[/code] entries.

members.member: The local Xbox user id associated with this PlayFab session.
The PlayFab entity key as a dictionary containing [code]id[/code] and [code]type[/code].
